MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Jerome Vitenson Administrator of the Yolanda Vitenson Estate is present. Represented by Jerome Vitenson.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Carlos Damian Morgner is present.
Attorney, Idin Kashefipour is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of April 02, 2013 is vacated.
